zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory Mure of Caldwell於1415年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾卡爾德威爾時，她的父親John Mure5歲，母親Elizabeth Lindsay24歲。她於1435年之前與Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡爾德威爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾霍賀亞德享年75歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory Mure of Caldwell于1415年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 艾斯爾卡爾德威爾时，她的父亲John Mure5岁，母亲Elizabeth Lindsay24岁。她于1435年之前与Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead在英国苏格兰艾斯爾卡爾德威爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾霍賀亞德享年75岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory Mure of Caldwell was born in 1415, in Caldwell, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Mure, was 5 and her mother, Elizabeth Lindsay, was 24. She married Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead before 1435, in Caldwell, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1490, in Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory Mure of Caldwell est née en 1415, à Caldwell, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mure, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lindsay, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead avant 1435, à Caldwell, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Caldwell, Renfrewshire, Schotland, Unite: Caldwell, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory Mure of Caldwell 1415 in Caldwell, East Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mure 5 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lindsay 24. Sie hat vor 1435 in Caldwell, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead prima del 1435, nel Caldwell, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1490, nel Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory Mure of Caldwellが1415年にイギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアカルドウエルで生まれた時，父John Mureは5歳，母Elizabeth Lindsayは24歳であった。1435年以前にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアカルドウエルでSir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkheadと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアハウクヘドで75歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory Mure of Caldwell(이)가 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 캘드웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mure(은)는 5세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lindsay(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1435년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 캘드웰에서 Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 호크헤드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead antes 1435, em Caldwell, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory Mure of Caldwell родилась в 1415 г. в местности калдвелл, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Mure было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lindsay, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Ross 1st Lord Of Halkhead перед 1435 г. в местности калдвелл, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности ховхид, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
